result.stdout:
Description:
  Vega Deployment - Docker and KubeVela manifest generator for .NET applications

Usage:
  vega-pack [options] [[--] <additional arguments>...]]

Options:
  -p, --project <project> (REQUIRED)  Path to the .csproj file
  -o, --output <output>               Directory to output the generated files [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-archet-4c21dcf5-3ed2eb19/output]
  --validate-only                     Validate the dockerfile and kubernetes manifests without generating files
  --docker-only                       Generate only the Dockerfile
  --k8s-only                          Generate only the Kubernetes manifests
  --template <template>               Path to a custom template file
  --build                             Build the Docker image after generating the Dockerfile
  --push                              Push the Docker image after building
  --delete-after-push                 Delete the Dockerfile after successful push
  --registry <registry>               Docker registry URL for push
  --tag <tag>                         Custom Docker image tag
  --username <username>               Docker registry username
  --password <password>               Docker registry password
  -v, --verbose                       Enable verbose logging
  --version                           Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information

Additional Arguments:
  Arguments passed to the application that is being run.
